outfit_info.outfit_description: A young boy sports a cozy, layered ensemble featuring a shearling-trimmed coat, a vibrant lilac sweatshirt, and dark pants. A ribbed beanie and ski goggles add a playful, adventurous touch. The look is completed with casual sandals, blending warmth with a relaxed, outdoor-ready vibe.

model_attributes.body: A small boy, appearing healthy and natural, with a friendly, slightly shy demeanor.
model_attributes.pose: Standing upright, facing forward, with hands clasped loosely in front, showcasing a confident stance.
model_attributes.background: A vast, misty polo field at sunrise or sunset, with distant horse riders and mountains in soft focus.

outfit.P01058009: grey ribbed-knit wool and cashmere beanie
